:::{#def-cond-pmf}

#### Conditional probability mass function

Let $X$ and $Y$ be jointly distributed discrete random variables.
The **conditional probability mass function** of $Y$ given $X = x$
(for values of $x$ with $\P(X = x) > 0$) is:

$$\P(Y = y \mid X = x) \eqdef \frac{\P(X = x,\, Y = y)}{\P(X = x)}$$

:::

---

:::{#exm-cond-pmf}

#### Conditional PMF from a joint table

Let $X$ and $Y$ be jointly discrete with joint probability mass function:

| | $Y = 0$ | $Y = 1$ |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $X = 0$ | $0.1$ | $0.2$ |
| $X = 1$ | $0.3$ | $0.4$ |

The marginal probability $\P(X = 0)$ is:

$$
\ba
\P(X = 0) &= \P(X = 0,\, Y = 0) + \P(X = 0,\, Y = 1)
\\&= 0.1 + 0.2
\\&= 0.3
\ea
$$

By @def-cond-pmf, the conditional PMF of $Y$ given $X = 0$ is:

$$
\ba
\P(Y = 1 \mid X = 0) &= \frac{\P(X = 0,\, Y = 1)}{\P(X = 0)}
\\&= \frac{0.2}{0.3}
\\&= \tfrac{2}{3}
\ea
$$

:::
